creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Yes, I fixed the ticket leaks in https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/1bdf879b97b686a8f36fdba050b68f9e7493f363 .  As for BATCH_FORGET, I haven't done anything about that one.  But grepping its codebase, I see that fusefs-ntfs doesn't support it either, so that won't help you.
